new_articles.title: Samsung's HBM4 sales cross $1 billion within four months
new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Samsung's HBM4 sales cross $1 billion within four months'이다. Samsung Electronics Co. recorded more than $1 billion in sales for its sixth-generation high bandwidth memory (HBM) chips, known as HBM4, just four months after launching mass production. recorded more than $1 billion in sales for its sixth-generation high bandwidth memory (HBM) chips, known as HBM4, just four months after launching mass production Listen to this article in summarized format ANI Samsung's HBM4 sales cross USD 1 billion milestone within four months Samsung Electronics Co recorded more than $1 billion in sales for its sixth-generation high bandwidth memory (HBM) chips, known as HBM4, just four months after launching mass production According to a news report by The Korea Herald, the South Korean tech giant became the first company globally to begin mass production and shipments of these advanced chips in February. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: In South Korea, a job or partner at Samsung, SK Hynix is the new 'A+' catch
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'In South Korea, a job or partner at Samsung, SK Hynix is the new 'A+' catch'이다. South Korean matchmaking firms say people working at the firms are now ​being ranked alongside doctors, lawyers and people from other traditionally elite professions as hefty bonuses linked to the global AI boom create a new class of affluent employees. "If SK Hynix and ⁠Samsung Electronics ⁠employees used to be classified as B+ or A-grade candidates, today they are closer to A+," said Son Dong-gyu, chief executive of matchmaking agency Bien Aller "But recently, when we ​introduce someone working at ​SK Hynix, the reaction is often 'Wow, people like that are here too? While Samsung and SK Hynix have long been considered prestigious family conglomerate-run companies in South Korea, their appeal long lagged the appeal of being ‌a doctor or lawyer "The competition (to get into Samsung and SK Hynix) has become intense," said Park Jun-young, a former Samsung Electronics employee who now works as a career consultant for university students " Growing interest ​from students in a ​semiconductor engineering degree that Korea University first launched ⁠with SK Hynix in 2021 drove the program's admission score to a historic high this academic year, according to data analysed by Jongro Academy. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

While Samsung and SK Hynix have long been considered prestigious family conglomerate-run companies in South Korea, their appeal long lagged the appeal of being ‌a doctor or lawyer "The competition (to get into Samsung and SK Hynix) has become intense," said Park Jun-young, a former Samsung Electronics employee who now works as a career consultant for university students " Growing interest ​from students in a ​semiconductor engineering degree that Korea University first launched ⁠with SK Hynix in 2021 drove the program's admission score to a historic high this academic year, according to data analysed by Jongro Academy. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: South Korea's KOSPI tanks nearly 10% to lead tech-fuelled Asia rout
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'South Korea's KOSPI tanks nearly 10% to lead tech-fuelled Asia rout'이다. Samsung and SK Hynix shed more than 12 per cent each, triggering an automatic 20-minute bourse-wide trading halt in the afternoon. The benchmark KOSPI closed down 910 71 points, its biggest daily plunge since Mar 4, at 8,203 Market bellwether Samsung Electronics Co and peer SK Hynix shed more than 12 per cent each, wiping out billions in market value and triggering an automatic 20-minute bourse-wide trading halt in the afternoon The KOSPI has become increasingly dominated by the two chipmakers that now make up more than half of the market value, as they propelled the index past the historic 9,100-point level for the first time on Monday 55 per cent at closing, falling to 69,788. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: Samsung deploys ChatGPT Enterprise, Codex globally 3 years after AI curbs
new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Samsung deploys ChatGPT Enterprise, Codex globally 3 years after AI curbs'이다. Samsung Electronics has opened up use of OpenAI's ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex across its global Device Experience division, reversing restrictions imposed in 2023 over data security concerns. The deployment highlights the growing adoption of enterprise AI tools as companies seek to balance productivity and security. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: SK Hynix ETF’s assets soar to $21.7 billion, making it biggest in Hong Kong
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK Hynix ETF’s assets soar to $21.7 billion, making it biggest in Hong Kong'이다. Shares of memory‑chip giant SK Hynix have jumped over 300 per cent in 2026 amid the AI boom. SK Hynix ETF’s assets soar to $21 PHOTO: REUTERS Published Jun 23, 2026, 12:00 PM Updated Jun 23, 2026, 07:07 PM SEOUL – CSOP Asset Management’s leveraged exchange traded product tied to SK Hynix has overtaken the Tracker Fund of Hong Kong to become the city’s largest ETF, highlighting investors’ voracious appetite for risky bets on the booming semiconductor sector Shares of memory-chip giant SK Hynix have jumped over 300 per cent in 2026, buoyed by strong earnings growth and optimism around artificial intelligence demand CSOP’s SK Hynix leveraged product “has ridden the AI, chip, tech wave and has returned almost 900 per cent year-to-date with almost US$2 billion of inflows while the rest is market appreciation,” said Bloomberg Intelligence ETF analyst Rebecca Sin BLOOMBERG More on this topic In South Korea, a job or partner at Samsung, SK Hynix is the new ‘A+’ catch South Korea’s early exports jump again as AI boom fuels chip demand See more on South Korea Semiconductors Stocks and shares E-paper Newsletters Podcasts RSS Feed About Us Terms & Conditions Personal Data Protection Notice Need help? 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: In South Korea, a job or partner at Samsung, SK Hynix is the new ‘A+’ catch
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'In South Korea, a job or partner at Samsung, SK Hynix is the new ‘A+’ catch'이다. Employees at the firms now being ranked alongside doctors, lawyers and people from other traditionally elite professions. SK Hynix revised its bonus structure in 2025 and in June, Samsung struck a pay deal with its union that included performance bonuses of around US$416,000 (S$538,700) for some chip employees “But recently, when we introduce someone working at SK Hynix, the reaction is often ‘Wow, people like that are here too? While Samsung and SK Hynix have long been considered prestigious family conglomerate-run companies in South Korea, their appeal long lagged the appeal of being a doctor or lawyer “The competition (to get into Samsung and SK Hynix) has become intense,” said Park Jun-young, a former Samsung Electronics employee who now works as a career consultant for university students ” Growing interest from students in a semiconductor engineering degree that Korea University first launched with SK Hynix in 2021 drove the programme’s admission score to a historic high this academic year, according to data analysed by Jongro Academy. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

SK Hynix revised its bonus structure in 2025 and in June, Samsung struck a pay deal with its union that included performance bonuses of around US$416,000 (S$538,700) for some chip employees “But recently, when we introduce someone working at SK Hynix, the reaction is often ‘Wow, people like that are here too? While Samsung and SK Hynix have long been considered prestigious family conglomerate-run companies in South Korea, their appeal long lagged the appeal of being a doctor or lawyer “The competition (to get into Samsung and SK Hynix) has become intense,” said Park Jun-young, a former Samsung Electronics employee who now works as a career consultant for university students ” Growing interest from students in a semiconductor engineering degree that Korea University first launched with SK Hynix in 2021 drove the programme’s admission score to a historic high this academic year, according to data analysed by Jongro Academy. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: In South Korea, a job or partner at Samsung, SK Hynix is the new 'A+' catch
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'In South Korea, a job or partner at Samsung, SK Hynix is the new 'A+' catch'이다. Channel NewsAsia is an English-language news organization based in Singapore. SEOUL, June 23 : The global AI boom has turned South Korean chipmaking giants SK Hynix and Samsung Electronics into stock market darlings. It has also thrust their employees into the top tier of the country's highly competitive marriage market. South Korean matchmaking firms say people working at the firms. "If SK Hynix and Samsung Electronics employees used to be classified as B+ or A-grade candidates, today they are closer to A+," said Son Dong-gyu, chief executive of matchmaking agency Bien Aller "But recently, when we introduce someone working at SK Hynix, the reaction is often 'Wow, people like that are here too? While Samsung and SK Hynix have long been considered prestigious family conglomerate-run companies in South Korea, their appeal long lagged the appeal of being a doctor or lawyer "The competition (to get into Samsung and SK Hynix) has become intense," said Park Jun-young, a former Samsung Electronics employee who now works as a career consultant for university students " Growing interest from students in a semiconductor engineering degree that Korea University first launched with SK Hynix in 2021 drove the program's admission score to a historic high this academic year, according to data analysed by Jongro Academy.
new_articles.original_title: In South Korea, a job or partner at Samsung, SK Hynix is the new 'A+' catch
new_articles.company_summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'In South Korea, a job or partner at Samsung, SK Hynix is the new 'A+' catch'이다. Channel NewsAsia is an English-language news organization based in Singapore. SEOUL, June 23 : The global AI boom has turned South Korean chipmaking giants SK Hynix and Samsung Electronics into stock market darlings. It has also thrust their employees into the top tier of the country's highly competitive marriage market. South Korean matchmaking firms say people working at the firms. "If SK Hynix and Samsung Electronics employees used to be classified as B+ or A-grade candidates, today they are closer to A+," said Son Dong-gyu, chief executive of matchmaking agency Bien Aller "But recently, when we introduce someone working at SK Hynix, the reaction is often 'Wow, people like that are here too? While Samsung and SK Hynix have long been considered prestigious family conglomerate-run companies in South Korea, their appeal long lagged the appeal of being a doctor or lawyer "The competition (to get into Samsung and SK Hynix) has become intense," said Park Jun-young, a former Samsung Electronics employee who now works as a career consultant for university students " Growing interest from students in a semiconductor engineering degree that Korea University first launched with SK Hynix in 2021 drove the program's admission score to a historic high this academic year, according to data analysed by Jongro Academy.

matched_articles.title: In South Korea, a job or partner at Samsung, SK Hynix is the new ‘A+’ catch
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'In South Korea, a job or partner at Samsung, SK Hynix is the new ‘A+’ catch'이다. Employees at the firms now being ranked alongside doctors, lawyers and people from other traditionally elite professions. SK Hynix revised its bonus structure in 2025 and in June, Samsung struck a pay deal with its union that included performance bonuses of around US$416,000 (S$538,700) for some chip employees “But recently, when we introduce someone working at SK Hynix, the reaction is often ‘Wow, people like that are here too? While Samsung and SK Hynix have long been considered prestigious family conglomerate-run companies in South Korea, their appeal long lagged the appeal of being a doctor or lawyer “The competition (to get into Samsung and SK Hynix) has become intense,” said Park Jun-young, a former Samsung Electronics employee who now works as a career consultant for university students ” Growing interest from students in a semiconductor engineering degree that Korea University first launched with SK Hynix in 2021 drove the programme’s admission score to a historic high this academic year, according to data analysed by Jongro Academy. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: In South Korea, a job or partner at Samsung, SK Hynix is the new 'A+' catch
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'In South Korea, a job or partner at Samsung, SK Hynix is the new 'A+' catch'이다. Channel NewsAsia is an English-language news organization based in Singapore. SEOUL, June 23 : The global AI boom has turned South Korean chipmaking giants SK Hynix and Samsung Electronics into stock market darlings. It has also thrust their employees into the top tier of the country's highly competitive marriage market. South Korean matchmaking firms say people working at the firms. "If SK Hynix and Samsung Electronics employees used to be classified as B+ or A-grade candidates, today they are closer to A+," said Son Dong-gyu, chief executive of matchmaking agency Bien Aller "But recently, when we introduce someone working at SK Hynix, the reaction is often 'Wow, people like that are here too? While Samsung and SK Hynix have long been considered prestigious family conglomerate-run companies in South Korea, their appeal long lagged the appeal of being a doctor or lawyer "The competition (to get into Samsung and SK Hynix) has become intense," said Park Jun-young, a former Samsung Electronics employee who now works as a career consultant for university students " Growing interest from students in a semiconductor engineering degree that Korea University first launched with SK Hynix in 2021 drove the program's admission score to a historic high this academic year, according to data analysed by Jongro Academy.

SEOUL, June 23 : The global AI boom has turned South Korean chipmaking giants SK Hynix and Samsung Electronics into stock market darlings. It has also thrust their employees into the top tier of the country's highly competitive marriage market. South Korean matchmaking firms say people working at the firms. "If SK Hynix and Samsung Electronics employees used to be classified as B+ or A-grade candidates, today they are closer to A+," said Son Dong-gyu, chief executive of matchmaking agency Bien Aller "But recently, when we introduce someone working at SK Hynix, the reaction is often 'Wow, people like that are here too? While Samsung and SK Hynix have long been considered prestigious family conglomerate-run companies in South Korea, their appeal long lagged the appeal of being a doctor or lawyer "The competition (to get into Samsung and SK Hynix) has become intense," said Park Jun-young, a former Samsung Electronics employee who now works as a career consultant for university students " Growing interest from students in a semiconductor engineering degree that Korea University first launched with SK Hynix in 2021 drove the program's admission score to a historic high this academic year, according to data analysed by Jongro Academy.

matched_articles.title: SK Hynix surpasses Samsung as South Korea's most valuable company
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK Hynix surpasses Samsung as South Korea's most valuable company'이다. SEOUL -- SK Hynix surpassed Samsung Electronics to become South Korea's most valuable company on Monday, the first time Samsung has been knocked out. AI boom mints a new market cap leader for first time since 2000. (Nikkei montage/Source photos by Reuters) KIM JAEWON June 22, 2026 15:12 JST Updated on June 22, 2026 17:31 JST SEOUL -- SK Hynix surpassed Samsung Electronics to become South Korea's most valuable company on Monday, the first time Samsung has been knocked out of the No 1 spot in more than 25 years. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: SK Hynix dethrones Samsung as South Korea’s most valuable company
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK Hynix dethrones Samsung as South Korea’s most valuable company'이다. SK Hynix is the dominant supplier of HBM chips used in AI systems for customers such as Nvidia and Google. “The emergence of customised AI memory fundamentally changed the industry’s economics and allowed SK Hynix to establish itself as the market leader,” said Kim Sun-woo, a senior analyst at Meritz Securities For SK Hynix, the achievement marks the culmination of one of the biggest turnarounds in South Korea’s corporate history In 2023, a severe downturn battered memory prices, pushing SK Hynix to report an annual operating loss of 7 Analysts attribute SK Hynix’s central role in the global AI ecosystem to its decision to continue investing in HBM, a specialised memory chip stacked vertically to deliver faster performance and lower power consumption, during a downturn in the memory industry By 2025, SK Hynix had captured 61 per cent of the global HBM market, far ahead of Samsung’s 17 per cent and Micron’s 21 per cent. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.
